product: Jobs in continuous mode can now have task-level retries for failed tasks
tagline: Jobs that are set to run in continuous mode now have the option to retry individual tasks on task failure.
what_it_does: Jobs that are set to run in continuous mode now have the option to retry individual tasks on task failure. Use continuous mode to schedule workloads to run continuously. Databricks recommends using continuous mode for always on streaming workloads.
why_it_matters: For continuous streaming with low latency requirements on serverless compute, use Triggered vs.
plain_summary: Jobs that are set to run in continuous mode now have the option to retry individual tasks on task failure. Use continuous mode to schedule workloads to run continuously.
key_takeaway: Jobs that are set to run in continuous mode now have the option to retry individual tasks on task failure.
